'''chawara''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:oilionaire|oilionaire]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ch-w-r
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:oilionaire|oilionaire]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| chawara
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:chæwæræth|chæwæræth]] || [[word:chæwæræj|chæwæræj]] || [[word:chæwæræsh|chæwæræsh]] || [[word:chæwæræ|chæwæræ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:chawawarath|chawawarath]] || [[word:chawawaraj|chawawaraj]] || [[word:chawawarash|chawawarash]] || [[word:chawawara|chawawara]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:chawarath|chawarath]] || [[word:chawaraj|chawaraj]] || [[word:chawarash|chawarash]] || [[word:chawara|chawara]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:chawafrath|chawafrath]] || [[word:chawafraj|chawafraj]] || [[word:chawafrash|chawafrash]] || [[word:chawafraf|chawafraf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:chawaratha|chawaratha]] || [[word:chawaraja|chawaraja]] || [[word:chawarasha|chawarasha]] || [[word:chawaraka|chawaraka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:chawarath|chawarath]] || [[word:chawaraj|chawaraj]] || [[word:chawarash|chawarash]] || [[word:chawara|chawara]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:chawarathal|chawarathal]] || [[word:chawarajal|chawarajal]] || [[word:chawarashal|chawarashal]] || [[word:chawarakal|chawarakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:chawarathatha|chawarathatha]] || [[word:chawarajaja|chawarajaja]] || [[word:chawarashasha|chawarashasha]] || [[word:chawaraka|chawaraka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:chawarathan|chawarathan]] || [[word:chawarajan|chawarajan]] || [[word:chawarashan|chawarashan]] || [[word:chawarakan|chawarakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:chawarathaoro|chawarathaoro]] || [[word:chawarajaoro|chawarajaoro]] || [[word:chawarashaoro|chawarashaoro]] || [[word:chawarakaoro|chawarakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|0c0cba0}}
